lines.hearsay: {place} looked thinner on the shelves than it likes to.
lines.gossip: {A} spent the afternoon moving jars forward on the shelves at {place} so the shelves would look fuller, which is a thing {A} only ever does when they are not.
lines.report: {A} recorded stock at {place} below the season's working minimum (trade {A.trade}), slot {slot}.
